headline: Is McCormick (MKC) Now An Opportunity After A 33% One Year Share Price Slide?
summary: Curious whether McCormick at around US$53 is a bargain or a value trap? This article walks through what the current share price might actually be saying. With the share price at US$53.07, recent returns have been weak, including a 0.3% decline over 7 days, a 23.1% decline over 30 days, a 21.1% decline year to date, and a 33.1% decline over 1 year. These moves come as investors continue to reassess long established consumer brands and their pricing power, particularly where growth...
